data.title: The floating profit of a 20x short BTC address has grown to $4.886 million
data.description: According to the monitoring of on-chain data analyst ai_9684xtpa, the floating profit of a 20x short BTC address has grown to 4.886 million US dollars. In addition, the 30x ETH short position of the address also has a floating profit of 190,000 US dollars, and the opening price is as high as 2,658 US dollars.

data.title: BTC And ETH Short Positions Yield Significant Profits
data.description: According to Odaily, on-chain data analyst ai_9684xtpa has reported that a Bitcoin short position with 20x leverage has reached an unrealized profit of $4.886 million. Additionally, the same address holds a 30x leveraged short position on Ethereum, with an unrealized profit of $190,000, opened at a price of $2,658.

data.title: In the past 9 hours, Galaxy Digital has withdrawn 282,500 SOL from exchanges such as OKX and Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, in the past 9 hours, Galaxy Digital withdrew 282,500 SOL (US$40.5 million) from OKX, Bitstamp, Coinbase and Binance, and then pledged 274,253 SOL (US$39.15 million).

data.title: Angola has recently cracked several cases involving Chinese citizens' cryptocurrency "mining"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Angola continues to carry out the "Searchlight" special operation to crack down on cryptocurrency "mining" activities throughout the country. Recently, the law enforcement has been strengthened and many cases involving Chinese citizens' "mining" have been cracked. The Chinese Embassy in Angola reminds Chinese citizens in Angola to operate in accordance with the law, especially to pay attention to not providing venues for virtual currency "mining", not providing electricity access for virtual currency "mining", and not storing "mining" equipment.

data.title: A whale address deposited 751 million FUN to Binance 8 hours ago, with a floating loss of 16.7 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, 8 hours ago, a whale address deposited 751 million FUN (about 1.55 million US dollars, accounting for 6.83% of the total supply) into Binance. These 751 million FUN were withdrawn from Binance during the bull market 4 years ago, and were worth 18.25 million US dollars at the time. The whale faces a loss of 16.7 million US dollars (-92%).

data.title: Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark has been included in the S&P SmallCap 600 index
data.description: According to market news, Nasdaq-listed Bitcoin mining company CleanSpark has been included in the S&P SmallCap 600 Index.

data.title: US CFTC: As of the week of March 4, the net long position of Bitcoin was 614 contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC): As of the week of March 4, the net long position of Bitcoin was 614 contracts. (Jinshi)

data.title: CleanSpark Joins S&P SmallCap 600 Index
data.description: According to Odaily, CleanSpark, a Bitcoin mining company listed on Nasdaq, has been included in the S&P SmallCap 600 Index.

data.title: CFTC Reports Bitcoin Net Long Positions for Early March
data.description: According to Odaily, the U.S. Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) reported that as of the week ending March 4, Bitcoin net long positions stood at 614 contracts.

data.title: Chainlink co-founder: The United States should continue to maintain its leadership in the new crypto financial system
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chainlink co-founder Sergey Nazarov attended the White House Crypto Summit: "I am deeply grateful for your serious attitude towards our industry and for the fact that you are actually helping to guide the industry in the right direction. I have worked with central banks in many other countries, and at that time I was wondering, when the whole world is pursuing a higher level of financial system, as an American citizen, why can't I help the US financial system to the next level. Therefore, I am very grateful at this moment that there is finally a new consensus and adoption of these concepts. I and many of you here believe that cryptocurrency, blockchain, and Web3 infrastructure will be the next iteration of the financial system. I believe that the United States should continue to maintain its leadership in this new financial system. I am very happy to see that David Sacks, Treasury Secretary Bessant, and Commerce Secretary Lutnick and others take this issue very seriously, and I am very grateful to them. So, I am very happy about this, and I think it is crucial to the role of the United States in the global financial system. Thank you very much."
